title: Maarjaara Oru Kalluvacha Nuna
overview: Due to an unfortunate event, Shanthanu leaves home and resides in the outskirts of the city named Ashramam Veedu. During the stay period, there is a twist of fate in Shanthanu's life as he encounters a chain of mysterious events
